title: Milestones in Monday Work Management
excerpt: Is there a way to flag a milestone on a task within a board? The goal would be to present a Gantt or calendar view showing only those tasks marked as milestones.

posts.author: ajhale21 (Amie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to flag a milestone on a task within a board? The goal would be to present a Gantt or calendar view showing only those tasks marked as milestones.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ajhale21 ,

You could create a column labeled Milestone and then create a filtered Gantt view to accomplish this.

I would use a checkbox column, and only check the items that are milestones. Then create a new board view → Select Gantt → Filter (switch to advanced filters) → When milestone is checked (screenshot below) → Save to this view
